scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run gateway" "npm run auth" "npm run media" "npm run social" "npm run ai" "npm run search" "npm run analytics"
scripts.docker:build: docker build -f docker/auth.Dockerfile -t deelish/auth-service:latest . && docker build -f docker/media.Dockerfile -t deelish/media-service:latest . && docker build -f docker/social.Dockerfile -t deelish/social-service:latest . && docker build -f docker/ai.Dockerfile -t deelish/ai-service:latest . && docker build -f docker/search.Dockerfile -t deelish/search-service:latest . && docker build -f docker/analytics.Dockerfile -t deelish/analytics-service:latest . && docker build -f docker/gateway.Dockerfile -t deelish/gateway:latest .
